versions.version_summary: Investigation tree model + unified run folder
Evaluator redesign (failure mode tags) + findings synthesis gate (Step 2b)
Query fix (COUNT DISTINCT), Geo/Non-Geo dimension, routing exit investigation, events.md reference
Inventory analysis overhaul — TID-level queries, 3-step path, Path A/B, supply gate, lost_checkouts_delta locus logic
URL breakdown query, S2C secondary-driver scoping, Section 3 ordering, action card quality gates
Bidirectional RCA support, four-pattern Slack reconciliation, link-to-table styling, jargon preservation
Tabbed report framework — perf-audit as second tab, cross-tab citations, scalable tab spec
Lazy-load references by phase — context.md+hypothesis.md at Step 2; actions.md+report_structure.md at Step 3
